title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at FM Logistic India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at FM Logistic India
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!
